name: Lemon Chiffon Pie ( Jell-o)
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons grated lemon peel, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir boiling water into gelatin in a large bowl for at least 2 minutes until completely dissolved.
2. Stir in lemon peel and juice.
3. Mix cold water and ice to make 1 1/4 cups.
4. Add mixture to gelatin, stirring until slightly thickened.
5. Remove any remaining ice.
6. Stir whipped topping into the gelatin mixture with a wire whisk until smooth.
7. Refrigerate for 20 to 30 minutes or until the mixture is very thick and will mound.
8. Spoon into crust.
9. Refrigerate for 6 hours or overnight until firm.
10. Garnish as desired, such as with quartered lemon slices.
Makes 8 servings.
